The '''Representative Council''' was the ruling body of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], headquartered in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] (which was largely the extent of its control). It was composed entirely of [[Balawai]], and exclusively served Balawai interests. Much of its funding came from off-world supporters of the [[thyssel bark]] trade.

The Council largely repressed the native [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] population. At the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] started there was a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] investigation into its abuses. Due to that, the Council voted to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

Branches of the Council's government included a Customs office, a [[Ministry of Justice (Balawai)|Ministry of Justice]], and a [[Balawai militia|civil militia]].
